amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 3 — paragraph 1 — point 44 d (new)
parliament_text:
(44d) ‘deep fake’ means manipulated or synthetic audio, image or video content that would falsely appear to be authentic or truthful, and which features depictions of persons appearing to say or do things they did not say or do, produced using AI techniques, including machine learning and deep learning;

‘deep fake’ means manipulated or synthetic audio, image or video content that would falsely appear to be authentic or truthful, and which features depictions of persons appearing to say or do things they did not say or do, produced using AI techniques, including machine learning and deep learning;
